title: King Living Sofa - Extra Discounts?
body:
Hi OzB fam, wife and I are pretty set on the Jasper (like most people) from King Living, but was just wondering if anyone has actual experience in successfully negotiating extra discounts particularly on top of their seemingly regular "50% off" sales?
Obviously not here to scrape every cent I can get (although this is the OzB way), but if we know for a fact that extra discounts can be had then that's a no brainer to go for, rather than paying the sticker price.
